ticket.title: Implement SAML SSO login
ticket.description: Add SAML single sign-on so enterprise design partners can log in with their IdP. Support SP- and IdP-initiated flows.

candidate_memory.link_reason: captures the SAML SSO requirement for this ticket

code_agent.rationale: Implementation needs the ticket's SAML notes, the auth module, the architecture, and the SAML decision. Workspace policy and release rollback are out of code_agent scope; Bob's local note and the agent's local scratch are private (NFR-E16-1).

qa_agent.rationale: QA additionally needs the release rollback plan; workspace policy is out of scope; the two local notes are private.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the ticket notes, the decision, and the workspace security policy, but not codebase internals or release ops; local notes are private.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees ticket/decision/workspace/release context but not codebase internals; local notes are private.

human_teammate.rationale: Alice (the assignee) sees every team-visible entry; Bob's and the agent's local notes never reached her device.
